title: HANDBOEK VAN ONDERSTEUNENDE MAATREGELEN
subtitle: Voor het optimaliseren van de bioveiligheid in de pluimveehouderij
description: A comprehensive guide compiling 50 supporting measures to enhance biosecurity in poultry farming. It offers practical factsheets, coaching tools, and training resources developed by the NETPOULSAFE Horizon 2020 project to improve compliance and disease prevention across the poultry production chain.
